name: Mordenkainen's Tome of Foes
summary: Sea elves fell in love with the wild beauty of the ocean in the earliest days of the multiverse. While other elves traveled from realm to realm, sea elves navigated the currents and explored the waters of many worlds. Today these elves can be found wherever oceans exist, as well as in the Elemental Plane of Water.
bonuses: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
Like other elves, sea elves can live to be over 750 years old.

Ability Score Increase.When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.
Creature Type.You are a Humanoid. You are also considered an elf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be an elf.
Speed.Your walking speed is 30 feet, and you have a swimming speed equal to your walking speed.

traits.name: Creature Type
traits.summary: You are a Humanoid. You are also considered an elf for any prerequisite or effect that requires you to be an elf.

traits.name: Child of the Sea
traits.summary: You can breathe air and water, and you have resistance to cold damage.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.summary: You have advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the charmed condition on yourself.

traits.name: Friend of the Sea
traits.summary: Aquatic animals have an extraordinary affinity with your people. You can communicate simple ideas to any Beast that has a swimming speed. It can understand your words, though you have no special ability to understand it in return.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.summary: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.summary: You don’t need to sleep, and magic can’t put you to sleep. You can finish a long rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness. Whenever you finish this trance, you can gain two proficiencies that you don’t have, each one with a weapon or a tool of your choice selected from thePlayer’s Handbook. You mystically acquire these proficiencies by drawing them from shared elven memory, and you retain them until you finish your next long rest.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Although elves reach physical maturity at about the same age as humans, the elven understanding of adulthood goes beyond physical growth to encompass worldly experience. An elf typically claims adulthood and an adult name around the age of 100 and can live to be 750 years old.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your walking speed is 30 feet, and you have a swimming speed equal to your walking speed.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.
